query_normalized: neural correlates of temporal prediction errors in auditory scene analysis neuroscience
rationale: This paper studies semantic vs acoustic information representation in auditory cortex, not temporal prediction errors. While both are in auditory neuroscience, the specific mechanism (prediction error signaling/predictive coding) is distinct from semantic categorization—this falls under the rejection rule for "distinct construct sharing only homonym keywords" (auditory/neural domain overlap without mechanism alignment).
